MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Burl Scott.
Attorney, Tony Ruch, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Luther Wright, is present.
Attorney, Mark Hitchcock, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-14-2010 is vacated.
